title: The Village Watches Luffy Fight
description: On pages 13–16, the village watches luffy fight focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
scene: On pages 13–16, the village watches luffy fight focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ha! How does being bitten by your own teeth feel!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They may be my teeth... but with your feeble little jaws...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen up... what defines a shark's teeth is its ability...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aghhh! his arm's going to be torn!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...those teeth would've torn his arm right off if he tried to take even one step back just now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well in his case, it's not as if he has the brains to actually understand how those teeth work...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
